q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: The sink is flask.redirect(bar) which performs URL redirection based on user input, a dangerous operation in test environments due to potential for open redirects.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Not evaluated because Q1 was true

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Not evaluated because Q1 was true

mock_guidance.capture: the bar parameter value passed to flask.redirect
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: return a mock Response object indicating redirection occurred without actually performing the redirect
notes: Mocking flask.redirect prevents actual HTTP redirection during testing while preserving the ability to verify the tainted value reached the sink
